model.sql:
WITH g14p_postgresql_orders_raw AS (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    customer_id,
    order_status,
    updated_at,
    total_amount
  FROM {{ source('<postgres_foreign_catalog>.<schema_name>', '<orders_table>') }}
  WHERE CAST(updated_at AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('<lower_bound_ts>' AS TIMESTAMP)
),
g14p_postgresql_orders_standardized AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(order_id AS STRING) AS order_id,
    CAST(customer_id AS STRING) AS customer_id,
    CAST(order_status AS STRING) AS order_status,
    CAST(updated_at AS TIMESTAMP) AS updated_at,
    CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18, 2)) AS total_amount,
    'postgresql' AS source_system,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g14p_postgresql_orders_raw
)
SELECT
  order_id,
  customer_id,
  order_status,
  updated_at,
  total_amount,
  source_system,
  load_dttm
FROM g14p_postgresql_orders_standardized
ORDER BY
  updated_at DESC,
  order_id

WITH g14q_sql_server_sales_raw AS (
  SELECT
    sales_order_id,
    customer_code,
    order_state,
    last_modified_at,
    gross_amount
  FROM {{ source('<sql_server_foreign_catalog>.<schema_name>', '<sales_orders_table>') }}
  WHERE CAST(last_modified_at AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('<lower_bound_ts>' AS TIMESTAMP)
),
g14q_sql_server_sales_standardized AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(sales_order_id AS STRING) AS sales_order_id,
    CAST(customer_code AS STRING) AS customer_code,
    CAST(order_state AS STRING) AS order_state,
    CAST(last_modified_at AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_modified_at,
    CAST(gross_amount AS DECIMAL(18, 2)) AS gross_amount,
    'sql_server' AS source_system,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g14q_sql_server_sales_raw
)
SELECT
  sales_order_id,
  customer_code,
  order_state,
  last_modified_at,
  gross_amount,
  source_system,
  load_dttm
FROM g14q_sql_server_sales_standardized
ORDER BY
  last_modified_at DESC,
  sales_order_id

WITH g14r_mysql_order_header_raw AS (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    account_id,
    order_status,
    updated_at,
    net_amount
  FROM {{ source('<mysql_foreign_catalog>.<schema_name>', '<order_header_table>') }}
  WHERE CAST(updated_at AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('<lower_bound_ts>' AS TIMESTAMP)
),
g14r_mysql_order_header_standardized AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(order_id AS STRING) AS order_id,
    CAST(account_id AS STRING) AS account_id,
    CAST(order_status AS STRING) AS order_status,
    CAST(updated_at AS TIMESTAMP) AS updated_at,
    CAST(net_amount AS DECIMAL(18, 2)) AS net_amount,
    'mysql' AS source_system,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g14r_mysql_order_header_raw
)
SELECT
  order_id,
  account_id,
  order_status,
  updated_at,
  net_amount,
  source_system,
  load_dttm
FROM g14r_mysql_order_header_standardized
ORDER BY
  updated_at DESC,
  order_id

WITH g14s_bigquery_events_raw AS (
  SELECT
    event_id,
    user_id,
    event_type,
    event_ts,
    event_value
  FROM {{ source('<bigquery_foreign_catalog>.<dataset_name>', '<events_table>') }}
  WHERE CAST(event_ts AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('<lower_bound_ts>' AS TIMESTAMP)
),
g14s_bigquery_events_standardized AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(event_id AS STRING) AS event_id,
    CAST(user_id AS STRING) AS user_id,
    CAST(event_type AS STRING) AS event_type,
    CAST(event_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS event_ts,
    CAST(event_value AS DOUBLE) AS event_value,
    'bigquery' AS source_system,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g14s_bigquery_events_raw
)
SELECT
  event_id,
  user_id,
  event_type,
  event_ts,
  event_value,
  source_system,
  load_dttm
FROM g14s_bigquery_events_standardized
ORDER BY
  event_ts DESC,
  event_id

WITH g14t_oracle_accounts_raw AS (
  SELECT
    account_id,
    customer_id,
    account_status,
    last_update_ts,
    credit_limit
  FROM {{ source('<oracle_foreign_catalog>.<schema_name>', '<accounts_table>') }}
  WHERE CAST(last_update_ts AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('<lower_bound_ts>' AS TIMESTAMP)
),
g14t_oracle_accounts_standardized AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(account_id AS STRING) AS account_id,
    CAST(customer_id AS STRING) AS customer_id,
    CAST(account_status AS STRING) AS account_status,
    CAST(last_update_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS last_update_ts,
    CAST(credit_limit AS DECIMAL(18, 2)) AS credit_limit,
    'oracle' AS source_system,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g14t_oracle_accounts_raw
)
SELECT
  account_id,
  customer_id,
  account_status,
  last_update_ts,
  credit_limit,
  source_system,
  load_dttm
FROM g14t_oracle_accounts_standardized
ORDER BY
  last_update_ts DESC,
  account_id

WITH g14u_redshift_fact_sales_raw AS (
  SELECT
    sale_id,
    store_id,
    sale_ts,
    sale_status,
    net_sales_amount
  FROM {{ source('<redshift_foreign_catalog>.<schema_name>', '<fact_sales_table>') }}
  WHERE CAST(sale_ts AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('<lower_bound_ts>' AS TIMESTAMP)
),
g14u_redshift_fact_sales_standardized AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(sale_id AS STRING) AS sale_id,
    CAST(store_id AS STRING) AS store_id,
    CAST(sale_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS sale_ts,
    CAST(sale_status AS STRING) AS sale_status,
    CAST(net_sales_amount AS DECIMAL(18, 2)) AS net_sales_amount,
    'redshift' AS source_system,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g14u_redshift_fact_sales_raw
)
SELECT
  sale_id,
  store_id,
  sale_ts,
  sale_status,
  net_sales_amount,
  source_system,
  load_dttm
FROM g14u_redshift_fact_sales_standardized
ORDER BY
  sale_ts DESC,
  sale_id

WITH g14v_snowflake_customers_raw AS (
  SELECT
    customer_id,
    customer_segment,
    created_at,
    is_active,
    annual_value
  FROM {{ source('<snowflake_foreign_catalog>.<schema_name>', '<customers_table>') }}
  WHERE CAST(created_at AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('<lower_bound_ts>' AS TIMESTAMP)
),
g14v_snowflake_customers_standardized AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(customer_id AS STRING) AS customer_id,
    CAST(customer_segment AS STRING) AS customer_segment,
    CAST(created_at AS TIMESTAMP) AS created_at,
    CAST(is_active AS BOOLEAN) AS is_active,
    CAST(annual_value AS DECIMAL(18, 2)) AS annual_value,
    'snowflake' AS source_system,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g14v_snowflake_customers_raw
)
SELECT
  customer_id,
  customer_segment,
  created_at,
  is_active,
  annual_value,
  source_system,
  load_dttm
FROM g14v_snowflake_customers_standardized
ORDER BY
  created_at DESC,
  customer_id

WITH g14w_teradata_account_balances_raw AS (
  SELECT
    account_id,
    product_code,
    snapshot_date,
    account_status,
    balance_amount
  FROM {{ source('<teradata_foreign_catalog>.<schema_name>', '<account_balances_table>') }}
  WHERE CAST(snapshot_date AS DATE) >= CAST('<lower_bound_date>' AS DATE)
),
g14w_teradata_account_balances_standardized AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(account_id AS STRING) AS account_id,
    CAST(product_code AS STRING) AS product_code,
    CAST(snapshot_date AS DATE) AS snapshot_date,
    CAST(account_status AS STRING) AS account_status,
    CAST(balance_amount AS DECIMAL(18, 2)) AS balance_amount,
    'teradata' AS source_system,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g14w_teradata_account_balances_raw
)
SELECT
  account_id,
  product_code,
  snapshot_date,
  account_status,
  balance_amount,
  source_system,
  load_dttm
FROM g14w_teradata_account_balances_standardized
ORDER BY
  snapshot_date DESC,
  account_id

WITH g14y_salesforce_data_360_profiles_raw AS (
  SELECT
    individual_id,
    segment_name,
    engagement_score,
    updated_at,
    consent_status
  FROM {{ source('<salesforce_data_360_foreign_catalog>.<schema_name>', '<unified_profile_table>') }}
  WHERE CAST(updated_at AS TIMESTAMP) >= CAST('<lower_bound_ts>' AS TIMESTAMP)
),
g14y_salesforce_data_360_profiles_standardized AS (
  SELECT
    CAST(individual_id AS STRING) AS individual_id,
    CAST(segment_name AS STRING) AS segment_name,
    CAST(engagement_score AS DOUBLE) AS engagement_score,
    CAST(updated_at AS TIMESTAMP) AS updated_at,
    CAST(consent_status AS STRING) AS consent_status,
    'salesforce_data_360' AS source_system,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g14y_salesforce_data_360_profiles_raw
)
SELECT
  individual_id,
  segment_name,
  engagement_score,
  updated_at,
  consent_status,
  source_system,
  load_dttm
FROM g14y_salesforce_data_360_profiles_standardized
ORDER BY
  updated_at DESC,
  individual_id
